items.name: Brother Maynard

portrait.alt: A fictional medieval-adjacent caretaker holding a clipboard and looking concerned.

items.tagline: Caretaker of small problems with large warning labels.

children.text: Brother Maynard has spent years cataloging tiny household risks, most of which fit in a picnic basket. His preferred management style is calm documentation, soft lighting, and a waiver printed on unusually heavy paper.

seo.title: Brother Maynard | Pet Share
seo.description: Meet the fictional caretaker behind one of Pet Share's most compact liabilities.

items.name: Dana Muffins

portrait.alt: A fictional tired but friendly pet owner holding a lint roller and a travel mug.

items.tagline: Professional lint roller user and part-time couch negotiator.

children.text: Dana joined Pet Share after realizing the household pets had formed a rotating committee for snacks, opinions, and decorative chaos. She is reliable, responsive, and usually carrying treats that were not meant for humans.

items.location: A sunny apartment with suspiciously washable rugs

seo.title: Dana Muffins | Pet Share
seo.description: Meet Dana, a fictional Pet Share owner with several washable rugs and a practical outlook.
